title: OrderEvent
description: Union of all event types on the order-events topic. Each event is discriminated by the event_type field.

OrderCreated.title: OrderCreated
OrderCreated.description: Emitted when a new order is placed.

event_type.description: Discriminator field identifying this event type.

total.description: Order total in the specified currency.

timestamp.description: When the order was placed, in ISO 8601 format.

metadata.description: Optional metadata associated with this event.

OrderUpdated.title: OrderUpdated
OrderUpdated.description: Emitted when an existing order is modified.

event_type.description: Discriminator field identifying this event type.

updated_fields.description: List of field names that changed.

timestamp.description: When the update occurred, in ISO 8601 format.

metadata.description: Optional metadata associated with this event.

OrderCancelled.title: OrderCancelled
OrderCancelled.description: Emitted when an order is cancelled.

event_type.description: Discriminator field identifying this event type.

cancelled_by.description: User or system that initiated the cancellation.

timestamp.description: When the cancellation occurred, in ISO 8601 format.

metadata.description: Optional metadata associated with this event.
